---
title: Automating whole-brain microscopy analysis with BrainGlobe
custom-font-sizes:
    attribution-font-size: 0.3em
---
## Whole-brain microscopy {background-color="black"}
![](img/whole.png){.nostretch fig-align="center" width=62%}

## Whole-brain microscopy {background-color="black"}
![](img/crop.png){.nostretch fig-align="center" width=62%}


## 3D cell detection

### [`cellfinder`](https://github.com/brainglobe/cellfinder)

![](img/raw.png){.nostretch fig-align="center" width="70%"}


## 3D cell detection

### [`cellfinder`](https://github.com/brainglobe/cellfinder)

![](img/classify.png){.nostretch fig-align="center" width="70%"}

## Brain atlases
![](img/3d_atlas.png){fig-align="center" }


## Atlas registration

![](img/cells.png){.nostretch fig-align="center" width="70%"}


## Quantification{.smaller}
::: {style="font-size: 0.6em"}
| Structure Name | Left Cells | Right Cells | Total Cells | Left Vol (mm³) | Right Vol (mm³) | Total Vol (mm³) | Left Cells/mm³ | Right Cells/mm³ |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Primary visual area, layer 2/3 | 964 | 1 | 965 | 1.0397 | 1.2568 | 2.2964 | 927.21 | 0.80 |
| Primary visual area, layer 5 | 644 | 6 | 650 | 0.9626 | 1.0232 | 1.9858 | 669.04 | 5.86 |
| Dorsal part of the lateral geniculate complex, core | 371 | 0 | 371 | 0.2506 | 0.2318 | 0.4824 | 1480.52 | 0.00 |
| Lateral posterior nucleus of the thalamus | 240 | 0 | 240 | 0.7498 | 0.7524 | 1.5022 | 320.10 | 0.00 |
| Primary visual area, layer 4 | 207 | 0 | 207 | 0.5938 | 0.6842 | 1.2780 | 348.59 | 0.00 |
:::



## Different species & organs
![](img/atlas.png){fig-align="center" .nostretch width="70%"}
